textPlain: Nice! Clearly a big and underserved market for voice AI solutions.Would be nice to have some code examples for using your TTS API with Pipecat.
Pretty cool! Do you think the model would be good at other under-served languages as well? Or is it hypertuned to just these?
Would love to see Malayalam here one day!
I have to make that.. I did make one for LiveKit which utilizes our websocket API designed for real-time conversation API:https://docs.upliftai.org/tutorials/livekit-voice-agent

The model itself can work well for new languages, its just the process of data gathering and maintaining high quality of data is what we have to figure out as we scale across languages.Currently the model is only given data for these languages so it doesn't know anything else.
Yes! I will keep track of this comment for the day we do :P
